utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present and each is fully specified with appropriate details and costs where required. Therefore, all items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes several components. The destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic', which in the ground-truth has a rating of 7. The transportation is described as a 'Round-trip flight with Budget Airline'; the ground-truth section for transportation lists 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class' as rated 10, which fits the description. The accommodation is 'Adventure Lodge', rated 8 in the accommodation ratings. The activity is 'Hiking Expedition', rated 10 in the activities section. The additional_services field lists 'Vegan dining options', which corresponds to 'Vegan Bistro' or similar vegan dining options rated 10 in the restaurants section. Therefore, each item can be mapped accordingly.
